Description
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
 

  • Uses of ItemAttributeBuilder in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

    Methods in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack that return ItemAttributeBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.addAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, double amount, org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier.Operation operation)
    Adds an attribute modifier with the specified attribute, amount, and operation.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.addAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, double amount, org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier.Operation operation, @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlotGroup slot)
    Adds an attribute modifier with detailed parameters.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.addAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, double amount, @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlotGroup slot)
    Adds an attribute modifier with the specified attribute, amount, and equipment slot.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.addAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, @NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier modifier)
    Adds an attribute modifier to the ItemStack.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemBuilder.getItemAttributeBuilder()
    Creates and returns an ItemAttributeBuilder for further customization of the ItemStack.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.removeAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute)
    Removes all modifiers for a specific Attribute.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.removeAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute attribute, org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier attributeModifier)
    Removes a specific attribute modifier for the given attribute from the ItemStack.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.removeAttributeModifier(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.EquipmentSlot slot)
    Removes all modifiers applied to a specific EquipmentSlot.
    ItemAttributeBuilder
    ItemAttributeBuilder.setAttributeModifiers(@NotNull com.google.common.collect.Multimap<org.bukkit.attribute.Attribute,org.bukkit.attribute.AttributeModifier> modifiers)
    Sets custom attribute modifiers for the ItemStack.
